title: Talent Searching Intern
description:
Are you curious about how top leaders are hired?
At PeopleSearch, we specialise in niche executive search, connecting senior talent to impactful roles. Join us and get real exposure to the world of high-level hiring

Learning opportunities:

  • Teamed up with mentors throughout your journey who are some of the best in the HR industry

  • Gain hands-on experience in candidate sourcing and shortlisting for executive roles

  • Develop market research, analytical, and evaluation skills

Job description:

  • Conduct targeted research to identify candidates and gather market insights

  • Assist with interview scheduling and candidate outreach, including cold calls

  • Support consultants with administrative tasks to coordinate and match candidate searches

Who we are looking for:

  • Quick learners who can adapt in a fast-paced environment

  • Detail-oriented, proactive, and confident communicators

  • Strong organisational and multitasking abilities

Work Location: Orchard
Working Schedule: Monday - Friday, 8.30am - 5.30pm

postedCompany.description:
PEOPLESEARCH PTE. LTD.


Elevating Careers and Empowering Businesses


PeopleSearch is a leading executive search, recruitment and outplacement services firm with a robust presence in 6 Asian cities: Singapore, Shanghai, Hong Kong, Taipei, Tokyo and Kuala Lumpur. We have been elevating careers and empowering businesses for over 20 years.

We are committed to helping both candidates and companies achieve their goals in concert with one another, hence our dedication to connecting businesses with high-performing executives who make a transformative impact on the bottom line while realising their own career aspirations.


Driving Business Strategies in a Wide Range of Industries


Our human capital solutions are predicated on vast experience, the latest market insights, and a repository of sectoral and geographical knowledge. Our extensive network also gives us access to a large pool of candidates, both active and passive, enabling us to acquire the best professionals in a variety of functional roles to drive your business strategies.

Our clients comprise multinational corporations, small and medium enterprises and start-ups in a wide range of industries including, but not limited to Technology, Healthcare and Life Sciences, Logistics and Supply Chain Management and Financial Services.


An Anticipatory and Bespoke Approach


We are with you every step of the way. As advisers and partners, our specialist consultants take an anticipatory approach, designing precise human capital solutions to help you realise your vision and achieve enduring success. Our bespoke solutions ensure you're future-ready and at the forefront of your field in any business environment.
postedCompany.name: PEOPLESEARCH PTE. LTD.
